body.title: Vetinari: CP1 clarification — ask Akien before ambiguous decompose
body.result: _parse_decompose_response (backward-compat object+array); confidence gate + CLARIFY channel post; handle_clarification_reply enriches+redecomposes; 9 tests
body.intention: I intend that Vetinari scores confidence before decomposing and asks Akien a clarifying question (via channel) when confidence is below threshold, waiting for reply before proceeding.
body.description:
CP1: when Vetinari doesn't know how to decompose a directive reliably, he asks rather than guesses. Currently there is no clarification capability at all.

Add confidence scoring to decompose_directive(): ask LLM to rate confidence 0.0-1.0 alongside the decomposition. If confidence < CLARIFY_THRESHOLD (0.7), post a clarifying question to the channel with directive_id in subject, set directive state to awaiting_clarification. Add handle_clarification_reply(directive_id, reply_text): update directive text with the clarification context and re-attempt decompose.

**Affected files:** devices/vetinari/device.py (add confidence scoring, clarification state, handle_clarification_reply()), tests/test_vetinari_clarification.py (NEW)
**Design rules:** clarification question posted via channel_post (not IMAP direct send); directive state machine: pending → awaiting_clarification → active; CP1 compliance logged at INFO
**Scope boundary:** IN — confidence scoring, clarification question post, handle_clarification_reply(), state machine extension; OUT — parsing the channel for replies (that requires intake shim extension — separately), CP3/CP6 audit
**Completion criteria:** mock LLM returns confidence=0.3 → clarification question posted to channel; directive state = awaiting_clarification; handle_clarification_reply() triggers re-decompose with enriched context; 5+ tests
